productDisplayName: Nike Men Arsenal Home Stadium Red Jersey
description: CompositionRed round neck Arsenal jersey with white border around the neck, logo embroidered on left chest, chest print, white sleeves and nike swoosh on right chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry inside-out in shade Cool iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean With a design for elite performance and club symbols for the winning side, the 2010/11 Arsenal football Club Official home men's Soccer Jersey honours the tradition and fierce style of play the Gunner's have long been known and revered for. Team this with performance shorts, tracks and even jeans, coupled with sports shoes for that cool, casual look.
